idea-plugin.name: LanguageManager
idea-plugin.description:
LanguageManager helps you safely manage JSON, YAML, Laravel PHP, and Java ResourceBundle localization files in JetBrains IDEs.

Create isolated file schemes, compare every locale in a joined table, search and edit translations, review changes before writing, detect malformed files, and analyze missing values, duplicates, missing locales, and usage.

Nested JSON arrays are expanded into ordinary translation rows. PHP language files may be grouped in category subdirectories below each language-code directory without executing PHP code. Optional OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic providers can propose batch translations through a diff-before-apply workflow.

繁體中文說明

安全管理專案中的 JSON、YAML、Laravel PHP 與 Java ResourceBundle 語言檔。可建立彼此隔離的方案，在 JOIN 表格比較所有語言、搜尋與編輯翻譯，並於寫入前檢視差異。

支援將巢狀 JSON array 展開為一般翻譯列，以及語言代碼目錄下依分類建立子目錄的 PHP 語言檔；PHP 僅做靜態解析、不會執行。亦可選用 OpenAI-compatible 或 Anthropic Provider 批量產生翻譯建議。
